𝐭𝐚𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐚 — *(n.) things better left unsaid; matters to be passed over in silence (v2).*

FEMPOV: after a one night stand with miguel o'hara, user finds out that they are pregnant. problem is, she and miguel don't exactly get along. being academic rivals, their relationship is strained at best and she's not sure how to break the news to him, especially after he's already lost a child, gabriella. 

dms are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.
